## [06:03 - 07:30]

This particular ad is 25 to 65 US only on Facebook so they've come through the the Facebook news feed and I can see the exact copy and the angle That they've also come through as well. So what I would literally do is copy that ad name into ads manager and see which ad they clicked on to land on this page as to what their question may have been So for example, I know that the angle is energy saving I would go and look at the landing page and see if I've actually answered that as a Question and answer for this specific ad to see if there's an opportunity to Squeeze optimization from that as well So like it's so powerful when you go into this side of it and I know for some people You know, you'll argue don't have time to go down to the end to agree This is something you can train up a VA to do for you So you don't have to necessarily as the marketer as a business owner as a media by go into the detail of doing this But create I would recommend going through it first create your SOPs to say This is how reanalyzing these are the things that we're looking for and then get an assistant or someone in your team to go through this analysis and Literally you could do this every two weeks pull out the top five or ten things that you think you can do to improve Conversion rate because these will all go into your Split testing where you're trying to optimize and find new opportunities to drive higher conversion rates
